parameters.query:
WITH candidates AS (
  SELECT ra.artifact_id
  FROM raw_artifacts ra
  LEFT JOIN artifact_processing ap
    ON ap.artifact_id = ra.artifact_id
   AND ap.processor = '{{ $json.processor }}'
  WHERE ra.source = 'cars.com'
    AND ra.artifact_type = 'detail_page'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM artifact_processing ap_ok
      WHERE ap_ok.artifact_id = ra.artifact_id
        AND ap_ok.status = 'ok'
        AND ap_ok.processor LIKE 'cars_detail_page__%'
    )
    AND (
          ap.artifact_id IS NULL
          OR ap.status = 'retry'
          OR (ap.status = 'processing' AND ap.processed_at < now() - interval '1 minutes')
        )
  ORDER BY ra.fetched_at ASC
),
claimed AS (
  INSERT INTO artifact_processing (artifact_id, processor, status, processed_at)
  SELECT c.artifact_id, '{{ $json.processor }}', 'processing', now()
  FROM candidates c
  ON CONFLICT (artifact_id, processor) DO UPDATE
    SET status = 'processing',
        processed_at = now(),
        message = NULL
  RETURNING artifact_id
)
SELECT ra.*
FROM raw_artifacts ra
JOIN claimed c ON ra.artifact_id = c.artifact_id
ORDER BY ra.fetched_at ASC;

WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ JSON.stringify($json.data).replace(/'/g,"''") }}'::jsonb)
    AS p(
      processor   text,
      artifact_id bigint,
      status      text,
      message     text,
      search_key  text,
      meta        jsonb,
      "primary"   jsonb,
      carousel    jsonb
    )
),
ra AS (
  SELECT artifact_id, fetched_at, url
  FROM raw_artifacts
  WHERE artifact_id IN (SELECT artifact_id FROM parsed)
),
rows AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    p.artifact_id,
    ra.fetched_at,

    COALESCE(
  NULLIF(p."primary"->>'listing_id', ''),
  NULLIF(regexp_replace(ra.url, '.*/vehicledetail/([^/]+)/?.*', '\1'), ra.url)
) AS listing_id,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(p."primary"->>'vin', ''),
      NULLIF(p.search_key, '')
    ) AS vin,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(p."primary"->>'listing_state',''), 'active')   AS listing_state,

    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'price',   '')::int                       AS price,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'mileage', '')::int                       AS mileage,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'msrp',    '')::int                       AS msrp,

    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'stock_type',  '')                        AS stock_type,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_name', '')                        AS dealer_name,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_zip',  '')                        AS dealer_zip

  FROM parsed p
  JOIN ra USING (artifact_id)
  WHERE p.status = 'ok'
)
INSERT INTO detail_observations (
  artifact_id,
  fetched_at,
  listing_id,
  vin,
  listing_state,
  price,
  mileage,
  msrp,
  stock_type,
  dealer_name,
  dealer_zip
)
SELECT
  artifact_id,
  fetched_at,
  listing_id,
  vin,
  listing_state,
  price,
  mileage,
  msrp,
  stock_type,
  dealer_name,
  dealer_zip
FROM rows
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ JSON.stringify($items("Aggregate")[0].json.data).replace(/'/g,"''") }}'::jsonb)
  AS p(
    artifact_id bigint,
    status      text,
    "primary"   jsonb,
    carousel    jsonb
  )
  WHERE status = 'ok'
),
dealers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (NULLIF(p."primary"->>'customer_id',''))
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'customer_id','')       AS customer_id,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_name','')        AS name,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_street','')      AS street,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_city','')        AS city,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_state','')       AS state,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_zip','')         AS zip,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_phone','')       AS phone,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_website','')     AS website,
    NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_cars_com_url','') AS cars_com_url,
    (NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_rating',''))::numeric(3,1) AS rating
  FROM parsed p
  WHERE NULLIF(p."primary"->>'customer_id','') IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(p."primary"->>'dealer_name','') IS NOT NULL
)
INSERT INTO dealers (customer_id, name, street, city, state, zip, phone, website, cars_com_url, rating)
SELECT customer_id, name, street, city, state, zip, phone, website, cars_com_url, rating
FROM dealers
ON CONFLICT (customer_id) DO UPDATE SET
  name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, dealers.name),
  street = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.street, dealers.street),
  city = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.city, dealers.city),
  state = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.state, dealers.state),
  zip = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.zip, dealers.zip),
  phone = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone, dealers.phone),
  website = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.website, dealers.website),
  cars_com_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.cars_com_url, dealers.cars_com_url),
  rating = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.rating, dealers.rating),
  last_updated_at = now();

WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ JSON.stringify($items("Aggregate")[0].json.data).replace(/'/g,"''") }}'::jsonb)
  AS p(
    artifact_id bigint,
    status      text,
    "primary"   jsonb,
    carousel    jsonb
  )
  WHERE status = 'ok'
),
ra AS (
  SELECT artifact_id, fetched_at, url
  FROM raw_artifacts
  WHERE artifact_id IN (SELECT artifact_id FROM parsed)
),
cards AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.artifact_id, src.source_listing_id, c->>'listing_id')
    p.artifact_id,
    ra.fetched_at,
    src.source_listing_id,

    NULLIF(c->>'listing_id','')            AS listing_id,
    NULLIF(c->>'price','')::int            AS price,
    NULLIF(c->>'mileage','')::int          AS mileage,
    NULLIF(c->>'body','')                  AS body,
    NULLIF(c->>'condition','')             AS condition,
    NULLIF(c->>'year','')::int             AS year
  FROM parsed p
  JOIN ra USING (artifact_id)

  -- derive source_listing_id once per parsed row
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT COALESCE(
      NULLIF(p."primary"->>'listing_id',''),
      NULLIF(regexp_replace(ra.url, '.*/vehicledetail/([^/]+)/?.*', '\1'), ra.url)
    ) AS source_listing_id
  ) src

  -- explode carousel array into rows
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(p.carousel, '[]'::jsonb)) AS c
  WHERE NULLIF(c->>'listing_id','') IS NOT NULL
)
INSERT INTO detail_carousel_hints (
  artifact_id,
  fetched_at,
  source_listing_id,
  listing_id,
  price,
  mileage,
  body,
  condition,
  year
)
SELECT
  artifact_id,
  fetched_at,
  source_listing_id,
  listing_id,
  price,
  mileage,
  body,
  condition,
  year
FROM cards
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

WITH data AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset(
    '{{ JSON.stringify($node["Aggregate"].json.data).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
  ) AS x(
    artifact_id bigint,
    status text,
    message text,
    meta jsonb
  )
)
UPDATE artifact_processing ap
SET
  status = d.status,
  processed_at = now(),
  message = d.message,
  meta = COALESCE(d.meta, '{}'::jsonb)
FROM data d
WHERE ap.artifact_id = d.artifact_id
  AND ap.processor = '{{ $node["Set Processor"].json.processor }}';
